dd-auth-001.question: How to model auth state given Supabase owns user data?
dd-auth-001.decision: Single AuthSession entity tracking local state only (status, cached userId/email, error). No User entity - Supabase is source of truth.
dd-auth-001.rationale: Avoids data duplication. Local state enables reactive UI without duplicating profile management. Singleton pattern via collection.get('current').

dd-auth-002.question: How to integrate Supabase client?
dd-auth-002.decision: IAuthService interface with SupabaseAuthService implementation. Mock implementation for testing.
dd-auth-002.rationale: Standard service interface pattern enables unit testing without live Supabase, consistent with codebase IEnvironment pattern.

dd-auth-003.question: What enhancement hooks will the domain need?
dd-auth-003.decision: enhanceModels: AuthSession.isAuthenticated, AuthSession.displayName; enhanceRootStore: initialize() for session recovery, authService injection via environment
dd-auth-003.rationale: Computed views derive from status field. Root store handles initialization and service injection per codebase patterns.
